sections.paragraph: m. a present, a gift, 1Ki 15:19 especially one to free from punishment, 2Ki 16:8 Pro 6:35 (compare Job 6:22); or to corrupt a judge, Exo 23:8 Deu 10:17 לָקַח שֹׁחַד to take a reward, Psa 15:5 26:10 1Sa 8:3.- Pro 17:8, אֶבֶן חֵן הַשֹּׁהַד בְּעֵינֵי בְעָלָיו “a precious stone is a gift in the eyes of its lord,” i.e. to him who receives it (compare בַּעַל No. 4).
